_comment: Curated recall regression set. Each case is a query a future session might realistically ask, targeting a drawer that is known to exist and known to matter. ADD A CASE whenever recall fails you in real use: you knew Penny stored it, she couldn't find it. Never delete a case because it fails — that is the eval working.

cases.query: which state machine library did we decide to use for per-skill state management
plan mode hybrid architecture decision extension vs skill responsibilities
mempalace pre-loading goal-directed search strategy instead of room-directed
why was the plan extension removed
progress heartbeats staleness window ProgressEmitter for long running agents
where do research files go project conventions rule
Intigriti extension created mirroring the hackerone extension pattern TDD
shared bug bounty module extracted types config tool wrapper base
web_search web_fetch tools Ollama web search API extension
Open WebUI models to Pi migration standard framework
